text: Every morning, I wake up at 6:30 and start my day with a glass of water and a short stretch. After a quick breakfast, I prepare for work, usually arriving at my desk by 8:30. My work schedule is busy but structured—I focus on tasks until lunch, then continue until 5:00 in the afternoon. To stay healthy, I exercise for 30 minutes right after work, either jogging or doing yoga. In the evenings, I enjoy cooking dinner, reading a book, or watching a TV show. I usually go to bed by 10:30. This routine helps me feel consistent and organized.
